Mutational signatures

2025-09-02

Sample preparation

Samples are restricted to those with sufficient somatic SNV burden for reliable signature extraction.

selected_samples <- c("L10858", "L8790", "L4618", "L8799", "L9684", "L10351")

filtered_variants <- trace_variants_paired |>
    filter(sampleName_tso500 %in% selected_samples,
           status      == "Somatic",
           varianttype == "SNV") |>
    mutate(sample_id = paste(patnr, timepoint, sep = "_"))

filtered_variants |>
    group_by(patnr, timepoint) |>
    summarise(n_somatic_snvs = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    arrange(desc(n_somatic_snvs))
## # A tibble: 6 × 3
##   patnr timepoint n_somatic_snvs
##   <chr> <chr>              <int>
## 1 874   PD                   151
## 2 874   BL                    93
## 3 624   PD                    63
## 4 340   PD                    56
## 5 624   BL                    47
## 6 340   BL                    22
vcf_list <- filtered_variants |>
    group_by(sample_id) |>
    group_split() |>
    lapply(function(df) {
        gr <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(
            sample_label = paste0(df$patnr, " (", df$timepoint, ")"),
            sample_id    = df$sample_id,
            seqnames     = df$chromosome,
            ranges       = IRanges::IRanges(start = df$position, width = 1),
            REF          = df$refcall,
            ALT          = df$altcall
        )
        GenomeInfoDb::genome(gr) <- "hg19"
        gr
    })

names(vcf_list) <- vapply(vcf_list, function(gr) unique(gr$sample_label), character(1))

Mutation matrix and COSMIC signature fitting

mut_mat    <- MutationalPatterns::mut_matrix(vcf_list, ref_genome = "BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg19")
## 
## Attaching package: 'S4Vectors'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     first, rename
## The following object is masked from 'package:utils':
## 
##     findMatches
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     expand.grid, I, unname
## 
## Attaching package: 'IRanges'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     collapse, desc, slice
## 
## Attaching package: 'Biostrings'
## The following object is masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     strsplit
cosmic_sig <- MutationalPatterns::get_known_signatures()
fit_res    <- MutationalPatterns::fit_to_signatures(mut_mat, cosmic_sig)

Reconstruction quality

cosine_sim            <- MutationalPatterns::cos_sim_matrix(mut_mat, fit_res$reconstructed)
reconstruction_quality <- diag(cosine_sim)

tibble(
    sample            = names(reconstruction_quality),
    cosine_similarity = reconstruction_quality
) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(sample, cosine_similarity), y = cosine_similarity)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#4E79A7", width = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.6) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
    labs(
        title = "Signature reconstruction quality",
        x     = NULL,
        y     = "Cosine similarity"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
    )

ggsave("results/figures/mutational_signatures_reconstruction_quality.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 5)

Trinucleotide mutation profiles

MutationalPatterns::plot_96_profile(
    mut_mat[, c("624 (BL)", "624 (PD)", "874 (BL)", "874 (PD)")],
    condensed = TRUE
) +
    labs(
        title = "96 trinucleotide mutation profile",
        y     = "Relative contribution",
        x     = "Mutation context"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        plot.title             = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title             = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x            = element_text(size = 5, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5),
        legend.position        = "bottom",
        strip.background       = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text             = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        panel.grid.major.x     = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x     = element_blank()
    )
## Warning in geom_bar(stat = "identity", colour = "black", size = 0.2): Ignoring
## unknown parameters: `size`

ggsave("results/figures/mutational_signatures_trinucleotide_profiles.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 6)

Mutational signature contributions

MutationalPatterns::plot_contribution(
    fit_res$contribution,
    coord_flip = TRUE,
    mode       = "relative"
) +
    labs(
        title = "Relative mutational signature contributions",
        y     = "Relative contribution",
        x     = "Sample"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
    )

ggsave("results/figures/mutational_signatures_contributions_relative.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 5)
fit_res$contribution |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    tibble::rownames_to_column("signature") |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(-signature, names_to = "sample", values_to = "contribution") |>
    group_by(sample) |>
    mutate(relative_contribution = contribution / sum(contribution)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    filter(contribution > 0) |>
    arrange(sample, desc(relative_contribution))
## # A tibble: 69 × 4
##    signature sample   contribution relative_contribution
##    <chr>     <chr>           <dbl>                 <dbl>
##  1 SBS88     340 (BL)        5.01                 0.197 
##  2 SBS12     340 (BL)        4.21                 0.166 
##  3 SBS14     340 (BL)        3.53                 0.139 
##  4 SBS20     340 (BL)        2.47                 0.0973
##  5 SBS39     340 (BL)        2.44                 0.0962
##  6 SBS32     340 (BL)        1.93                 0.0762
##  7 SBS22     340 (BL)        1.25                 0.0493
##  8 SBS33     340 (BL)        1.19                 0.0470
##  9 SBS17a    340 (BL)        1.09                 0.0430
## 10 SBS1      340 (BL)        0.883                0.0348
## # ℹ 59 more rows
